summary: Completed testing of Top Stammkunden Rotation on Kiosk Locked Screen and Custom Palette Editor features. All 15 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified. Fixed SettingsUpdate schema to accept both dict and list types.
passed_tests: GET /api/stats/top-registered?period=month&limit=3 - returns only is_registered players with highlight stats
GET /api/stats/top-registered - includes highlight stat (180+, checkout, throw, or winrate)
GET /api/stats/top-registered caching - second call within 45s returns cached data
GET /api/stats/top-registered - respects period parameter (today, week, month, all)
GET /api/settings/stammkunde-display - returns config with all fields (enabled, period, interval_seconds, max_entries, nickname_max_length)
PUT /api/settings/stammkunde-display - admin can toggle enabled
PUT /api/settings/stammkunde-display - admin can update period
PUT /api/settings/stammkunde-display - admin can update all fields
GET /api/settings/palettes - returns all palettes including defaults
PUT /api/settings/palettes - admin can add custom palette with custom:true flag
PUT /api/settings/palettes - default palettes preserved when adding custom
GET /api/settings/palettes - returns all palettes including custom ones
PUT /api/settings/palettes - can delete custom palette by excluding from list
PUT /api/settings/stammkunde-display - requires authentication
PUT /api/settings/palettes - requires authentication
Frontend: Kiosk Locked Screen shows Top Stammkunden rotation when enabled
Frontend: Stammkunden rotation shows #rank, truncated nickname, ShieldCheck badge, stats (1S/1G, 100% Quote), highlight (100.0%)
Frontend: Stammkunden rotation hides when disabled (toggle OFF)
Frontend: Admin Settings has Stammkunde tab with toggle, period, interval, max_entries, nickname_length inputs
Frontend: Admin Settings Farbschema tab has 'Neues Schema' button
Frontend: Palette editor opens with name field, 6 color inputs with color pickers, live preview
Frontend: Palette editor shows contrast warnings for low contrast combinations (Text / Hintergrund: Kontrast 1.2:1 (zu niedrig!))
Frontend: Creating and saving a new custom palette adds it to the palette grid
Frontend: Custom palettes show delete button on hover, default palettes do not
Frontend: JSON export button present (clipboard copy)
Frontend: JSON import toggle and textarea present
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed SettingsUpdate schema in schemas.py to accept Union[dict, list] instead of just dict - palettes is stored as a list
seed_data_present: TestMax, TEST_UpGuest_167a5c13 (registered Stammkunden visible in rotation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Top Stammkunden Rotation and Custom Palette Editor features fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET/PUT /api/settings/stammkunde-display, GET/PUT /api/settings/palettes, GET /api/stats/top-registered. Stammkunde display is currently enabled (toggle ON). Custom palettes can be created/edited/deleted via the palette editor. The SettingsUpdate schema was fixed to accept both dict and list types. Default palettes don't have delete buttons, custom palettes do.

fixed_during_testing.root_cause: SettingsUpdate schema in schemas.py defined value: dict but palettes is stored as a list
fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed SettingsUpdate.value from dict to Union[dict, list]
